tasks.label: ISO rebuild + inspect
tasks.command: pkill -9 qemu-system-x86_64 || true; cd /home/t4ce/Repos/TRUEOS && make iso-debug && ls -l bld/trueos.iso && xorriso -indev bld/trueos.iso -report_el_torito plain | head -n 120

tasks.label: Rebuild ISO after limine.conf fix
tasks.command: cd /home/t4ce/Repos/TRUEOS && make iso-debug && echo '== ISO tree /EFI/BOOT ==' && xorriso -indev bld/trueos.iso -ls /EFI/BOOT && echo '== El Torito ==' && xorriso -indev bld/trueos.iso -report_el_torito plain | head -n 40 && echo '== ESP limine.conf ==' && mtype -i bld/iso-bootroot/efi.img ::/EFI/BOOT/limine.conf | head -n 80
